site.name: StudyStoa
site.tagline: Global philosophy, thought, education, learning, and certification news

home.intro: A daily-updated portal aggregating signal from world-class philosophy, thought, education, learning, and certification sources. Operated by Nobuki Fujimoto (founder of Rei-AIOS). Phase 1 MVP — content quality builds gradually.

about.title: About StudyStoa
about.operator_role: Independent researcher · Founder of Rei-AIOS · ORCID 0009-0008-0775-3960
about.related_site_text: Rei-AIOS (rei-aios.pages.dev) — research frontier · Zenodo papers · Lean 4 formal verification · D-FUMT₈ 8-valued logic
about.role_rei_aios: Rei-AIOS: research / formulas / code / formal proofs / non-commercial academic
about.role_studystoa: StudyStoa: commentary / news / multilingual / curated reading lists (commercial-friendly)
about.role_separation_reason: Operating two separate sites protects the philosophical purity of research while providing an accessible reading layer for the broader public.
about.honest_scope_text: StudyStoa aggregates headlines and summaries from third-party sources (Inside Higher Ed, The Hechinger Report, Hacker News education, Stanford Encyclopedia of Philosophy, Daily Nous, n-Category Café, PhilArchive, and others). Each card links back to the original source. Images shown are taken from each source's published Open Graph metadata (intended for syndication). Phase 1 (Q2 2026): MVP launch with weekly updates. Phase 2-3: expand to daily updates, multilingual, and Giscus-based discussion.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Nobuki Fujimoto. Content from third-party sources is attributed to original publishers.
